lines.text: I kind of like this approach. Not to mention, this is the only clue we have right now. Worth a try.
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Let me take a look at it... This fella here seems to be a kind of "machine"... Wait, this model... It's the final model of B.1.N.G.O.!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Funny enough, the original blueprints had B.I.N.G.O. geared up for actual combat. But thanks to a lack of Exoswarm materials and some serious bottlenecks in the Department of Engineering...
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: The Institute ended up mounting B.1.N.G.O. on a "trash can" as a temporary solution. By the time the final model was ready, it claimed it had grown attached to the "setup" and refused to migrate its data.
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: I just did a quick scan. Turns out it's using this technology called "holographic projection coating" to disguise itself as Daigo.
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Plus, it was "fed" a massive amount of data on Daigo to analyze and learn his psychological and behavioral patterns. There are still some subtle tells, though...
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
